subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The fragrances of the Divine Word are diffused, the aroma of the sacred vesture is spread abroad, and the light of His Cause is resplendent. Blessed are they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد نفحات کلمه الهی متضوع و عرف قمیص منتشر و نور امر ساطع طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @business; financial; property matters
